payload.answer: I can help rewrite an existing memory, but the statement is ambiguous: “He” and “the other one” don’t identify the person or item clearly enough. Please choose how to proceed.
repair_options: Clarify the person and item, e.g. “Rewrite the memory to: [Name] prefers [specific item].”
Select the existing memory this should rewrite, then provide the replacement wording.
Keep this as a draft and ask for clarification before changing any memory.
